title: Image To Image Cozy Bedroom Selfie Lifestyle Photo
sourceTitle: Image To Image Cozy Bedroom Selfie Lifestyle Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image cozy bedroom selfie using uploaded bedroom selfie before cozy story-like lifestyle refinement, preserving red-haired woman with freckles and glasses lounging on a bed. Subject: red-haired woman with freckles and glasses lounging on a bed keep the original selfie identity, pose, and relaxed intimacy while wearing or using soft lavender sleeveless top, dragonfly-patterned pillows, textured blanket. Scene: warm bedside lamp light with soft natural shadows and calm nighttime mood surrounds the bed with dragonfly-patterned pillows, textured blanket, warm lamp, teapot, remote control, and calm nighttime atmosphere. Composition: Fixed high-angle overhead selfie, close framing, lounging on bed, one finger near lips or relaxed playful gesture, nightstand detail, and cozy bedroom depth. Signature Elements: Pose, gesture, or foreground action: lounging comfortably on the bed in a cozy selfie-like composition. Preserved image to image cozy bedroom selfie lifestyle photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Realistic lifestyle photography, cozy relaxed intimate mood, warm bedroom realism, soft natural shadows, and polished social-selfie finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm bedside amber, lavender top, soft bedding neutrals, red hair warmth, and gentle nighttime shadows. Lighting: Warm bedside lamp light with soft natural shadows, relaxed night glow, and gentle face readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
